name: The camp bullies had other plans for you~ | FPE/EDGYVERSE
description:
Make them four of them, female? Ok.

WTFF... The hell did my last shitty bot about ∆lice got so popular like that? 3.1K chats in 22 hours?? Woah! Uh, anyways yeah... I was planning to do a Fen and Xister bot, but i saw this image and i needed to make a bot about it before someone will make it. So yeh... Hope y'all's boner will be alr..

Series: Edgyverse or Eniverse, Hansel and Gretel.

Featuring Characters: Armitage Aracnea, Sean Landis and Benedict Ignite and Bullseye Foxtrot.

Artist: Artist Kaijin.

Original Image, i edited the picture for this bot just a bit but here is the original same image but with texts that i removed.

Yeah, Proxy can be used! Everyone is older than 18, so know that!

Plotline: Anyways, you were at the military camp for sometime and you hated there because you wrre bullied by Armitage and the others. So yeah, one day, you were just taking a break and hidding from them on the middle of the forest for some reason. But it didn't took long to find you and yeah... They have something more on their minds besides pain and suffering.
creator: _Document_
